fields.label: Gateway label
fields.helpText: A short label to identify this bundle (e.g. 'Research tools', 'Customer support stack'). Members are managed via the gateway settings panel.

metadata.summary: Bundle multiple MCP servers under one credential. Attach the gateway to a persona once and inherit every member tool.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Create this gateway credential with a descriptive label.
2. Open the gateway's settings panel to add member MCP credentials.
3. Attach the gateway to any persona -- the persona will see every enabled member's tools combined into one list, with tool names prefixed by the member's display name.
